text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You've been acting restless all day... Is something
the matter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
M-me? Restless? Whatever could you be talking
about?! C'mon now! It's not like there's a surprise
or anything!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oops! J-just a slip of the tongue! Everyone's
definitely not planning a surprise party for you
tonight!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever it is, it certainly sounds like fun.
I'm glad that it's not a call for concern.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? U-um, Suzuka? Do you remember what
day it is today?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Is something special happening today? At
the very least, I'm fairly certain I don't have a
race...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's your birthday, Suzuka! Happy
birthday!
